Templates misuse: mistyped and unexported targets, duplicate
declarations, illegal helpers.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26

require github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/templates v0.0.0

replace github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/templates => TEMPLATEDIR
-- main.go --
package main

import "os"

func main() { os.Exit(run()) }
-- web/templates.go --
package web

import (
	"embed"
	"strings"
)

//fabrik:templates
var notEmbed string

//fabrik:templates
var NotFS string

//fabrik:templates
//go:embed all:templates
var Templates embed.FS

type T struct{}

//fabrik:templates:func
func (t *T) Method(s string) string { return s }

//fabrik:templates:func
func NoResults(s string) {}

//fabrik:templates:func name=upper
func UpperCase(s string) string { return strings.ToUpper(s) }

//fabrik:templates:func name=upper
func AlsoUpper(s string) string { return strings.ToUpper(s) }

//fabrik:templates:func name=bad.name
func Dotted(s string) string { return s }

//fabrik:templates:func
func shout(s string) string { return s }
-- web/templates/_default/_layout.html --
<html>{{ block "content" . }}{{ end }}</html>
-- web/templates/_default/home.html --
{{ define "content" }}ok{{ end }}
-- want/diags --
error: web/templates.go:8:1: //fabrik:templates variable has no //go:embed
  help: add //go:embed all:templates above the variable
error: web/templates.go:11:1: //fabrik:templates variable has no //go:embed
  help: add //go:embed all:templates above the variable
error: web/templates.go:20:1: //fabrik:templates:func must be on a package-level function (func Method is a method)
  help: move the helper out of the method set
error: web/templates.go:23:1: template function NoResults has an illegal signature
  help: html/template functions return one value, or two with the second an error
error: web/templates.go:29:1: duplicate template function name "upper"
  help: first declared at $WORK/web/templates.go:26:1
error: web/templates.go:32:30: invalid template function name "bad.name"
  help: use a short identifier: name=humanize
error: web/templates.go:35:1: template function shout is unexported
  help: generated code lives in package main; export the function
